name: Third party caused my job site death - what claims for family in Ogden?

mainEntity.name: Third party caused my job site death - what claims for family in Ogden?

acceptedAnswer.description: Workers' comp death benefits first, plus wrongful death suit against third party.[7] Comp exclusive for employer. Key factors: (1) Dependency proven for benefits; (2) No-fault comp pays burial, wages; (3) Third-party full damages like pain; (4) Two-year statute. File comp immediately, then sue. Attorney coordinates both.
